title: Fix data-contract: outcome_distribution shape mismatch between producer + consumer
description: Per gap-miner appaudit (CRITICAL): producer Aggregation::Engine#outcome_distributions emits nested {count, percentage} hashes per contract; gap-miner's OutcomeDistribution#percentage_for returns the raw value and DenialAnalyzer immediately compares it to a Float — would raise ArgumentError: comparison of Hash with Float failed on real producer output. Tests pass on both sides because fixtures inject what each side expects. Add a real producer-to-consumer round-trip integration spec. Surfaced in 2026-05-28 truth audit.
notes: GitHub: jeremylongshore/wild-gap-miner#2 — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/wild-gap-miner/issues/2. MIRROR RULE: bd-sync handles fan-out — `bd-sync note wild-rails-ai-ops-7y6` and `bd-sync close wild-rails-ai-ops-7y6` mirror to GH and Plane automatically.

title: Fix data-contract: producer wild-session-telemetry header missing required source_id
description: Per gap-miner appaudit (CRITICAL): contract doc wild-session-telemetry/000-docs/004-AT-STND-data-contracts.md §4.2 requires source_id in the export header; producer code (Export::RecordBuilder#header, Export::Exporter#build_header) does not emit it; gap-miner's Models::ExportHeader#valid? rejects without it. EVERY live export from telemetry crashes gap-miner with SchemaError. Fix: emit source_id from the producer. Surfaced in 2026-05-28 truth audit.
notes: GitHub: jeremylongshore/wild-session-telemetry#14 — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/wild-session-telemetry/issues/14. MIRROR RULE: bd-sync handles fan-out — `bd-sync note wild-rails-ai-ops-cs3` and `bd-sync close wild-rails-ai-ops-cs3` mirror to GH and Plane automatically.

title: Replace v1 stub CapabilityGate in wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp with real wild-capability-gate
description: Per rails-introspection appaudit: lib/wild_rails_safe_introspection/identity/capability_gate.rb:41 has permitted? == authenticated?. Any valid API key gets full read access to every allowlisted model. Cross-repo blocker: depends on wild-capability-gate being published and integrated. Once #wild-rails-ai-ops capability-gate-publish bead lands, swap stub for real gate. Surfaced in 2026-05-28 truth audit.
notes: GitHub: jeremylongshore/wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp#22 — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp/issues/22. MIRROR RULE: bd-sync handles fan-out — `bd-sync note wild-rails-ai-ops-37k` and `bd-sync close wild-rails-ai-ops-37k` mirror to GH and Plane automatically.

title: Resolve doc-drift: telemetry → transcript-pipeline → gap-miner pipeline is fictional
description: Per transcript-pipeline + gap-miner appaudits: the documented data flow from session-telemetry through transcript-pipeline into gap-miner has NO actual wiring code in any of the three repos. gap-miner has zero transcript-handling code (verified by grep); transcript-pipeline has no SessionTelemetryAdapter consuming from telemetry; session-telemetry CLAUDE.md declares transcript-pipeline as a downstream consumer that doesn't exist. Action: either implement the pipeline OR amend the three docs (ecosystem CLAUDE.md, session-telemetry §6.3, transcript-pipeline §Downstream Consumer Contract) to mark this as v2-aspirational. Surfaced in 2026-05-28 truth audit.
notes: GitHub: jeremylongshore/wild-transcript-pipeline#2 — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/wild-transcript-pipeline/issues/2. MIRROR RULE: bd-sync handles fan-out — `bd-sync note wild-rails-ai-ops-llx` and `bd-sync close wild-rails-ai-ops-llx` mirror to GH and Plane automatically.

title: Fix wild-capability-gate Rule 5 audit-completeness gap on evaluation_error denials
description: Per capability-gate appaudit: Gate#evaluate's outer rescue unwinds before emit_audit runs, so :evaluation_error denials never produce an audit event. No test asserts this case. Governance Rule 5 (every evaluation produces an audit log entry) is technically violated. Fix: move audit emission into the rescue path; add adversarial spec asserting audit emission on evaluation_error. Surfaced in 2026-05-28 truth audit.
notes: GitHub: jeremylongshore/wild-capability-gate#11 — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/wild-capability-gate/issues/11. MIRROR RULE: bd-sync handles fan-out — `bd-sync note wild-rails-ai-ops-zgd` and `bd-sync close wild-rails-ai-ops-zgd` mirror to GH and Plane automatically.

title: Pin wild-capability-gate by version in wild-admin-tools-mcp Gemfile (remove branch: main float)
description: wild-admin-tools-mcp/Gemfile depends on wild-capability-gate via git with branch: 'main' — any push to capability-gate@main silently upgrades downstream. Supply-chain risk. Pin to a published gem release (semver) once capability-gate publishes to RubyGems, or pin to a specific git ref in the interim. Affects every wild-* repo that depends on another wild-* repo by branch. Surfaced in capability-gate appaudit, 2026-05-28 truth audit.
notes: GitHub: jeremylongshore/wild-admin-tools-mcp#12 — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/wild-admin-tools-mcp/issues/12. MIRROR RULE: bd-sync handles fan-out — `bd-sync note wild-rails-ai-ops-44t` and `bd-sync close wild-rails-ai-ops-44t` mirror to GH and Plane automatically.

title: Mirror wild ecosystem audit and cleanup work in beads and GitHub issues
description: Phase F of the 2026-05-28 truth & presentation audit. Initialize bd in the umbrella repo; create epic beads for each phase; create cross-repo finding beads with bd-sync link to GH issues in the affected per-repo. Beads are the single coordination point for ecosystem-wide work; per-gem implementation tasks remain in each gem's own .beads instance.
notes: Phase F core work landed: bd initialized in umbrella (prefix wild-rails-ai-ops); 6 epic beads created and 4 closed (Phases A/B/D/E), Phase C marked blocked on intent-audit-harness#44, Phase F marked in_progress; 10 cross-repo finding beads created (7y6, 8cm, 8zu, 37k, 44t, cs3, llx, wbd, yq7, zgd) and bd-sync linked to matching GH issues across 6 wild-* repos. Pending: commit/push .beads/{issues,interactions}.jsonl + final verification dry-run (Task #8).

title: Polish the GitHub presentation of all 10 wild gems
description: Phase E of the 2026-05-28 truth & presentation audit. Per-repo: set GH description + topics; add ecosystem callout to README pointing to umbrella; apply branch protection on main; cut v0.1.0 release where missing; pull-sync local with origin. Discovery path (org page -> umbrella -> per-gem) must work cleanly in an incognito browser.
close_reason: Phase E complete. All 10 wild-* repos polished: descriptions set (2 were empty: session-telemetry + permission-analyzer); topics applied (wild-ecosystem + ruby-gem + 1-2 specific per repo); branch protection on main (no force-push, no deletions); v0.1.0 releases cut on the 2 that were missing (wild-admin-tools-mcp, wild-capability-gate); ecosystem callout added/updated in all 10 READMEs pointing to wild-rails-ai-ops umbrella. 10 commits pushed across the 10 repos (appaudit + README callout bundled per commit).

title: Create and publish the wild-rails-ai-ops ecosystem umbrella repo
description: Phase D of the 2026-05-28 truth & presentation audit. Create jeremylongshore/wild-rails-ai-ops as the public umbrella repo: README with per-gem table, ARCHITECTURE.md with dependency map + known v1->v2 gaps, governance files (CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, CODE_OF_CONDUCT), LICENSE, CLAUDE.md. Set description + topics. Update intent-solutions-io org profile to feature the umbrella.
close_reason: Phase D complete. Created public repo jeremylongshore/wild-rails-ai-ops with README + ARCHITECTURE.md + CLAUDE.md + governance files (CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, CODE_OF_CONDUCT) + LICENSE. Description set, topics applied (wild-ecosystem, rails, ruby, mcp, ai-agents). intent-solutions-io/.github/profile/README.md updated to feature Wild Ecosystem entry under Production Systems (commit a4e17b6).

title: Produce operator-grade appaudits for all 10 wild ecosystem gems
description: Phase B of the 2026-05-28 truth & presentation audit. Run /appaudit against each wild-* repo, file as 000-docs/NNN-AT-AUDT-appaudit-2026-05-28.md. Each audit covers mission, runtime architecture, critical path, failure modes, trade-offs, operator playbook, and v2 recommendations. Surface cross-repo issues to the umbrella for filing.
close_reason: Phase B complete. 10/10 appaudits filed at wild/<repo>/000-docs/NNN-AT-AUDT-appaudit-2026-05-28.md, total ~38K words (range 3,100-4,400 per repo). Spawned via 10 docs-architect subagents in parallel, transcript-pipeline retry needed after watchdog stall on first attempt. All 10 commits pushed to origin/main on each repo. Cross-repo findings extracted: hook-ops adoption gap, branch-pin supply-chain risk, capability-gate Rule 5 audit gap, WildcardMatcher contract drift, data-contract drift (source_id + outcome_distribution), 3-gem data-pipeline doc fiction, CapabilityGate v1 stub in rails-introspection, missing wst CLI for gap-miner operator guide. These are filed as separate beads under Phase F.

title: Truth-correct the wild ecosystem documentation for senior-engineer review
description: Phase A of the 2026-05-28 truth & presentation audit. Bring all 10 wild-* CLAUDE.md files in line with reality (v1 complete, GH repos exist, beads initialized per repo). Add Archetype labels and Status lines that were missing. Rename hook-ops 000-docs to canonical NNN-CC-ABCD shape. Reframe wild/CLAUDE.md §1 around the workspace pattern. Add §11 per-repo status table as ecosystem source of truth.
close_reason: Phase A complete. Doc edits: wild/CLAUDE.md (§1, §10 rewritten + new §11), wild-hook-ops/CLAUDE.md (Status added), wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp/CLAUDE.md (Archetype added), wild-hook-ops/000-docs/* (6 files renamed to NNN-CC-ABCD shape), wild/000-docs/009-AT-AUDT-... audit report filed, wild/000-docs draft files moved to wild/notes/. Top-level wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp duplicate fast-forwarded and deleted (origin had everything; nested clone retained .beads). 2 commits pushed: wild-hook-ops@c8e9cd7, wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp@4f73283.

title: Resolve missing wst CLI: gap-miner operator guide references wst export, no CLI exists
description: Per session-telemetry appaudit (HIGH cross-repo): wild-gap-miner/000-docs/006-OD-GUID-operator-workflow-guide.md:19-21 instructs operators to run 'wst export --from ... --output ...'. No wst CLI exists in wild-session-telemetry (no bin/wst, no executable in gemspec). Operators following the documented downstream workflow hit command not found. Fix: either build Thor-based wst CLI in session-telemetry, or amend gap-miner's guide to show Ruby-API invocation. Surfaced in 2026-05-28 truth audit.
notes: GitHub: jeremylongshore/wild-session-telemetry#15 — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/wild-session-telemetry/issues/15. MIRROR RULE: bd-sync handles fan-out — `bd-sync note wild-rails-ai-ops-8zu` and `bd-sync close wild-rails-ai-ops-8zu` mirror to GH and Plane automatically.

title: Add shared WildcardMatcher fixture corpus between wild-permission-analyzer and wild-capability-gate
description: Per permission-analyzer appaudit: WildcardMatcher pattern language (* greedy, dots literal via Regexp.escape) is defined in exactly one place (analyzer side) with no shared fixture set tested by both analyzer and gate. If gate ever supports {a,b} alternation or char classes, the analyzer silently mis-resolves grants. Fix: ship a fixture corpus in capability-gate (or a shared gem), have both repos test against it. Surfaced in 2026-05-28 truth audit.
notes: GitHub: jeremylongshore/wild-permission-analyzer#3 — https://github.com/jeremylongshore/wild-permission-analyzer/issues/3. MIRROR RULE: bd-sync handles fan-out — `bd-sync note wild-rails-ai-ops-wbd` and `bd-sync close wild-rails-ai-ops-wbd` mirror to GH and Plane automatically.
